race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Maiden Plate
race.comment: Keen on the honest ZINOVATION (9) who really deserved a maiden win. Placed 5/9 so far and comes off a tougher maiden at Pakenham over a little further last time. Placed only try in soft going and since the last run has since finished runner-up in a hurdle trial. Looks well placed here and gets his chance. SALTILLO (7) is a four-start maiden and is perhaps better than the form looks. At peak fitness now and looks suited by the longer journey. Certainly worth another chance. ATEYATE (1) is another close to a win and can give a sight again. WIZARDESS (10) hasn't been far away at big odds lately and can sneak into the finish this time.
